zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Poultney於大約1292年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓時，他的父親Adam de POULTNEY32歲，母親Maud DE NAPTON28歲。他和Mrs. Ellen De Poultney至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1360年在英國英格蘭享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Poultney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pountney
meanings: English: locative name from Poultney (Leics), which is recorded as Pontenei in 1086 and Pulteney in 1220. The place-name derives from an Old English personal name * Pulta (genitive * Pultan) + Old English ēg ‘island, piece of dry ground in a fen’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Poultney was born about 1292, in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam de POULTNEY, was 32 and his mother, Maud DE NAPTON, was 28. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Mrs. Ellen De Poultney. He died in 1360, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Poultney est né environ 1292, à Misterton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam de POULTNEY, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maud DE NAPTON, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs. Ellen De Poultney. Il est décédé en 1360, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Poultney um 1292 in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de POULTNEY 32 und seine Mutter Maud DE NAPTON 28. Er hatte mit Mrs. Ellen De Poultney mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1360 im Alter von 69 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Poultney è nato il circa 1292 nel Misterton, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Adam de POULTNEY, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Maud DE NAPTON, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Mrs. Ellen De Poultney. Morì nel 1360, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Poultney(이)가 대략 1292년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 미스터턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de POULTNEY(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud DE NAPTON(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Mrs. Ellen De Poultney(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.
